function.name: check_converge_dx
function.description: Conduct a 2D heat transfer PDE simulation and evaluate its dx convergence. This experiment will conduct both PDE solving and convergence testing in one function. It will return {"Error_RMSE": float, "is_converged": bool, "accumulated_cost": int, "The number of iterations the solver will perform to simulate the environment based on the parameters you have given": int, "The number of iterations the solver will try to verify convergence based on the parameters you have given": int, "The cost of the solver simulating the environment": int, "The cost of the solver verifying convergence (This will not be included in your accumulated_cost)": int}.
